userValueDefinition.problemSolved: Directional intelligence helps users understand which direction of travel or impact is affected by a delay, crossing impact, roadway hazard, or directional roadway condition.
userValueDefinition.mission: Improve awareness before travel decisions; not navigation, routing, turn-by-turn guidance, or route optimization.

placementEvaluation.rationale: Best match for Know Before You Go because directional context clarifies situational awareness without implying navigation.
Useful later for focused review, but premature for MVP because it creates a new surface and support burden.
Can help destination-adjacent interpretation but may be mistaken for travel advice.
Alert wording is safety-sensitive and could overstate certainty or priority.
Route Watch is closer to route intelligence and should follow awareness validation, not lead it.

options.label: Toward Houston / Toward Cleveland / Toward Conroe / Toward Liberty

languageEvaluation.primaryStrategy: Use full-word cardinal direction labels: Northbound, Southbound, Eastbound, Westbound.
languageEvaluation.rationale: Full words are readable, accessible, scalable across counties, and less ambiguous than abbreviations, toward-city phrasing, or inbound/outbound language.

confidenceThresholdDesign.rationale: User-facing display must start with the most reliable directional candidates. Reviewed or ambiguous records should not be visible until separately validated and authorized.

reviewBucketVisibilityDesign.decision: Review buckets remain excluded from user-facing directional visibility.

requiredSafeguards: do not derive user labels from geometry bearing alone
fail closed when only bearing is available
log or classify bearing-only records for internal review only

countyContainmentDesign.requirement: Directional intelligence may only appear when county containment passes.

userFacingSafetyRules: fail closed on missing, degraded, or conflicting evidence
no display without explicit future display authorization
no Route Watch, Alert, Destination, DriveTexas, or Transportation Intelligence wiring in V701

included: full-word direction labels for strong contained candidates only

productStrategyRecommendation.rationale: Awareness Cards best match Gridly's posture of Awareness Platform First and Route Intelligence Second while limiting premature routing or alert implications.

nextPhaseRecommendation.milestone: V702 — Directional Awareness Layer Implementation Plan
nextPhaseRecommendation.purpose: Translate approved design into an implementation plan.
